entries.title: poll_device_token silent fallback masks parse failures
entries.closure_evidence: Commit ae74af7: replaced silent unwrap_or_else fallback with explicit map_err returning DeviceFlowError::Other with parse error context.
entries.closure_note: Fixed: JSON parse failure now returns DeviceFlowError::Other(format!("Failed to parse success response as JSON: {e}")) instead of silently wrapping in a fake envelope.

entries.title: JWT user_id extraction silently degrades to "unknown"
entries.closure_evidence: Commit ae74af7: added tracing::warn!(..."Failed to extract user_id from platform JWT, using 'unknown'") before unwrap_or_else fallback.
entries.closure_note: Fixed: JWT extraction fallback now logs a warning via tracing::warn! for debugging.

entries.title: login() error message inaccuracy on token store failure (QC2 notes: code path unreachable)
entries.closure_evidence: V1.11 Batch 3 (commit c81b356): login() rewritten to persist refresh_token/refresh_expires_at; error handling updated.
entries.closure_note: Superseded by V1.11 refresh_token implementation which rewrote login() flow.

entries.title: TOCTOU race in get_or_create_device_id file permissions
entries.closure_evidence: V1.11 Batch 2 (commit 86ac950): Rewrote get_or_create_device_id() with atomic create_new(true) + retry loop.
entries.closure_note: Fixed: Atomic file creation via OpenOptions::new().write(true).create_new(true). AlreadyExists falls back to reading.
